title: Supreme Court expands role of prison reforms panel to oversee protection of disabled prisoners' rights
description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday issued directions to ensure the proper implementation of the rights of persons with disabilities in prisons across the country [Sathyan Naravoor v. Union of India].A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta passed the order after noting the need for an effective, structured and uniform mechanism to address the issues faced by persons with disabilities."The rights of prisoners with disabilities must be recognised and effectuated in a manner that accords with a
